zh.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: 英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Naunton於大約1358年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight30歲，母親Mary de Aspall25歲。她於大約1384年與Sir Roger Drury在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年9月3日在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Naunton于大约1358年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可盧加姆时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight30岁，母亲Mary de Aspall25岁。她于大约1384年与Sir Roger Drury在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年9月3日在英国英格兰素福爾可享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可盧加姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Naunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Naunton Hall in Rendlesham (Suffolk). Some of the bearers cited here may belong to (2).

2 English: locative name apparently also from Naughton (Suffolk), which is recorded as Nawelton in about 1150. The place-name may derive from the Old Scandinavian personal name Nagli + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. The 1327 bearer cited below points to assimilation of n-l-n to n-n-n in the surname.

variants.name: Nanton
meanings: English (Cheshire): probably a variant of the Suffolk surname Naunton, a habitational name from Naunton Hall in Rendlesham and possibly also Naughton (both in Suffolk). The latter may derive from the Old Norse personal name Nagli + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘god’, often referring in particular to Indra; also a term of address for kings, equivalent to ‘Your Majesty’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Naunton was born about 1358, in Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight, was 30 and her mother, Mary de Aspall, was 25. She married Sir Roger Drury about 1384, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 3 September 1405, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Naunton est née environ 1358, à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mary de Aspall, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Drury environ 1384, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1405, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Naunton um 1358 in Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight 30 und ihre Mutter Mary de Aspall 25. Sie hat um 1384 in Suffolk, England Sir Roger Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. September 1405 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Naunton è nata il circa 1358 nel Rougham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mary de Aspall, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger Drury circa 1384, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1405, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Nauntonが約1358年にイギリスイギリススフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knightは30歳，母Mary de Aspallは25歳であった。約1384年にイギリススフォルクでSir Roger Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年9月3日にイギリスイギリススフォルクで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクロウアムスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 루그함 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Naunton(이)가 대략 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Aspall(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1384년 영국 수폴크에서 Sir Roger Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 9월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 루그함 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Naunton nasceu aproximadamente 1358, em Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Aspall, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Drury aproximadamente 1384, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1405, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: ст мэри'с чурч, роугам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Naunton родилась около 1358 г. в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Aspall, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Drury около 1384 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 сентября 1405 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри'с чурч, роугам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Naunton nació aproximadamente 1358, en Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Naunton ,Knight, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mary de Aspall, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Roger Drury aproximadamente 1384, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1405, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
